news.t: Bitwise Launches BPRO, the Bitwise Proficio Currency Debasement ETF, Combining Exposure to Bitcoin, Gold, Miners, & Precious Metals; Actively Managed With Expertise of Proficio Capital Partners

overview.description: The Bitwise Proficio Currency Debasement ETF (BPRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that allocates investments across assets identified to be best positioned to declines in major currencies. BPRO was launched on Jan 21, 2026 and is issued by Bitwise.

data.title: Bitwise Launches BPRO, the Bitwise Proficio Currency Debasement ETF, Combining Exposure to Bitcoin, Gold, Miners, & Precious Metals; Actively Managed With Expertise of Proficio Capital Partners
data.text: A first-of-its-kind ETF, BPRO aims to help investors position for global currency debasement with the benefit of diversification and active management. SAN FRANCISCO, Jan. 22, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Bit...
